message: [0]: The user initiates a motivational discussion with the goal of gaining insight into what motivates others.
raw_message: Hey! Glad to finally talk to you. I want to ask you, what motivates you?
reason: Get motivation from others

fact: User is a big video game fan
message: [2]: The user shares their love for video games and their positive experience of using them as a way to relax.
raw_message: Cool, James! I'm a big video game fan too. They help me relax after a long day. What game are you currently enjoying the most?
reason: Video games help with relaxation

attribue: interested in a certain programming language
message: [4]: The user is considering a new activity and wants to know about its awesomeness.
raw_message: Haven't played it yet, but I hear it's awesome. Gonna give it a go. BTW, just signed up for a programming class. Have you ever done any programming?
reason: The person has heard the thing is cool

attribue: user want to be proficient in various programming languages
fact: the user learn HTML and CSS previously
message: [6]: The user is reviewing their learning of some programming skills which they learned previously.
raw_message: I did a bit of coding in HTML and CSS a few years back. Thought I'd refresh those skills in this course. What languages do you like most and any projects you've done?
reason: Refresh the skills learned a few years ago

message: [8]: The user is impressed with the graphics of a video game mod.
raw_message: That mod looks amazing! The graphics are awesome. What other programming languages have you worked with?
reason: The graphics and mod of the video game

message: [10]: User proposes collaboration on mobile app development.
raw_message: Maybe in the future we will develop mobile applications together? Do you like the idea?
reason: The mention of collaboration suggests willingness to work with others

attribue: user is asking about other people's pets
message: [12]: User is excited and happy about their pet, and wants to know more about other people's pets.
raw_message: Aww, they're adorable! What are the names of your pets? And what are your plans for the app?
reason: The user is excited and affectionate towards their pets

attribue: user ask for clarification on existing tech Apps
fact: the user ask about the features of other existing apps
message: [14]: User inquires about the unique features of a new tech app.
raw_message: Sounds good, James! Bet that app would find a lot of buyers. What sets it apart from other existing apps?
reason: The user seems to believe that the app will be successful.

fact: You're working on a programming project
message: [16]: The user is excited about working on a programming project and wants to add personal touches.
raw_message: That's a great idea! Your pup is gonna love it. Speaking of personal touches, what motivates you to work on your programming projects?
reason: Your pup will love the project

message: [18]: The user acknowledges others' accomplishments, expressing pride in their own work progress.
raw_message: What are you working on that has you feeling so accomplished?
reason: The user feels proud of their work progress.

message: [20]: User is positive towards game development
raw_message: Wow, James! That's amazing. What made you decide to work on it and create your own game?
reason: Curiosity about creating a game

fact: the user finds making something new inspirational
message: [22]: The user finds combining their passions to make a new project inspiring.
raw_message: That sounds really fulfilling! Combining your passions to make something new must be so exciting. Can't wait to see the outcome. (image description: a photo of a medical chart with instructions for the procedure)
reason: Creating something new can be inspiring and exciting

fact: Express willingness to collaborate with James
message: [24]: The user is positive about working with James.
raw_message: It will be great to work with you, James.
reason: Looking forward to collaboration and good working relationship

fact: Run in the morning; Dislike bowling
message: [26]: The user expresses mixed emotions towards participating in an activity, highlighting their struggles with a physical attribute.
raw_message: I'm sure you're very good at this. Unfortunately, I can’t share my love for him with you, my fingers are too big. Perhaps I should take up exercise, at least start going for a run in the morning. And I also don’t like bowling itself, to be honest.
reason: Fingers are too big; exercise to compensate

attribue: user open minded towards activities beyond gambling
message: [28]: The user proposes alternative activities.
raw_message: Well, I'm sure we can do something else. We can play slot machines and arcades, for example.
reason: Asking for alternatives to gambling

attribue: user may be sad or upset
message: [30]: The person offers to look after the speaker's pockets.
raw_message: I'm sorry to hear it. Well, I'll be nearby, I'll look after your pockets.
reason: The person is showing their concern for others

message: [32]: The user expresses interest in trying out VR gaming.
raw_message: Heard about VR gaming? It's pretty immersive. We can try it together!
reason: Want to experience and play with others

attribue: user is eager for collaborative experience
fact: try virtual reality experience a few times
message: [34]: The user has tried virtual reality and wants to try it together with others.
raw_message: Tried it a few times, it's insane how immersive that experience can be. Can't wait to try it together with you.
reason: The user finds VR experience immersive and enjoyable.

message: [36]: The user expresses their agreement.
raw_message: Agreed, James!
reason: James' agreement to something

message: [38]: James enjoys building and connecting with others in a community.
raw_message: Hey James, awesome! Glad you're enjoying it and connecting with others. Building a community is really cool, especially when you meet people who enjoy the same things.
reason: Building a community is really cool
